summary: Iteration 2 testing of OpportuneAI platform completed successfully. All major features upgraded: Compatibility Score (50% skill + 30% role + 20% location), Multi-API integration (Arbeitnow + Remotive), real course recommendations, and premium UI design. All 22 test requirements met with 100% backend success and 100% frontend functionality.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/signup with unique email - creates new user successfully
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with test@example.com/testpass123 - returns valid token
Backend: PUT /api/profile/update with skills, target_roles, preferred_locations - updates correctly
Backend: GET /api/internships - returns 114 internships with compatibility_score (NOT match_score)
Backend: Verified sources array contains ['Arbeitnow', 'Remotive'] confirming multi-API
Backend: Verified NO match_score or readiness_score fields in internship response
Backend: POST /api/recommendations/analyze - returns compatibility_score with skill_match_pct, role_match_pct, location_match_pct
Backend: Verified learning_paths have courses array with platform, name, url fields from Coursera/GeeksforGeeks/freeCodeCamp
Backend: POST /api/bookmarks - bookmark functionality working
Backend: PUT /api/applications/{id} - update application status working
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats - returns correct statistics
Frontend: Auth page loads with premium design (clean card, no gradient bg)
Frontend: Login flow works and redirects to dashboard correctly
Frontend: Dashboard shows 6 stat cards with gradient icons
Frontend: Navigate to Internships page via sidebar successful
Frontend: Internship cards show compatibility_score badge (42% format) NOT match_score
Frontend: Analyze button opens skill gap dialog successfully
Frontend: Skill gap dialog shows Compatibility Score (42%), skill/role/location percentages
Frontend: Skill gap dialog shows course recommendations with Coursera/GeeksforGeeks/freeCodeCamp platforms and clickable links
Frontend: Navigate to Profile page and found Skills section
Frontend: Navigate to Bookmarks page successful
Frontend: Navigate to Applications page successful
Frontend: All sidebar navigation between pages working (5/5 pages)
Frontend: Premium UI design confirmed - Plus Jakarta Sans typography, rounded cards, clean backgrounds
Frontend: Bookmark functionality clickable and working
